description: Glitzy silvery stilettoes with innovative design details. For a high-glamour evening, this is the right choice. Keep the accessories metallic and tonal, and the ensemble simple and elegant. Heel: 3" Upper Metallic forefoot strap for a snug Fit and great visual appeal Metal loop detail on the forefoot strap Padded footbed with embossed branding Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on the heel for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
